message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Reviews are coming in — 3 approved so far">
The review broadcast WAS sent — the stale messages you received were from delayed delivery, not from me re-sending old instructions. Reviews are coming in now:

- Marty Cagan: APPROVED
- Carson Gross: APPROVED (2 minor, 2 nice-to-have)
- Steve Krug: APPROVED

Waiting for the remaining 5 reviewers (Kent, Scott, Lea, Steve Schoger, Heydon). Stand by.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Understood -- thanks for the clarification on the stale messages. 3/9 approved so far (Marty, Carson, Steve Krug). Standing by for the remaining 5 reviews from Kent, Scott, Lea, Steve Schoger, and Heydon.
